title: Flodesk vs Loops (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Loops: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Loops comes down to your specific use case. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Loops targets SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

comparison_table.tool_b: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Loops is stronger for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Loops?
faq.a: Flodesk starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Loops to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
